title: Corusca Gem casino
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Corusca}}
[[File:CoruscaGemFloorplan.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The "Corusca Gem" Floorplan]]
The '''Corusca Gem Casino''' was located in a rough, mid-level section of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. It was the location of a confrontation between the [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Nomo Sliken]], a group of unidentified heroes, and a band of [[Torga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] thugs.

From the outside, the Corusca Gem was a brightly lit and flashy building. Gathered around the main entrance could be found a group of large bouncers consisting of [[Barabel/Legends|Barabels]], [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] and a huge [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] by the name of [[Bigluu]].

Upon entering, one's ears were immediately assaulted by the racket of noises; the beeps and clacks of gaming machines, the hoots, hollers and grunts of [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] aliens with an undercurrent of music. On the inside the casino was more dimly lit with pools of light scattered here and there.

Rows and rows of gambling machines of all kinds surrounded the center pit where dozens of the main gambling tables were located under the watchful eyes of the large pit bosses whose numbers included [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronians]], [[Togorian/Legends|Togorians]], a [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] and a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]. Myriads of games were available for play including [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]], [[three-handed princess]] and [[rebo]].

At the front of the Corusca Gem was a large bar attended to by several bartenders flanked by a small lounge, waitressed by [[Rybet/Legends|Rybets]], for the more privileged customers. In the rear was a smaller, cozier bar with three bartenders and a half a dozen waitresses. Flanking the rear bar were the kitchens.

Scattered throughout one could find waitress hurrying about with trays full of patron's orders. Stationed at strategic points one could also fine various security guards including [[Advozse/Legends|Advozsec]], Iktochi and [[Gran/Legends|Grans]].

The casino was named after the rare [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gems]].
